en.title: Perfect IVs (Hundos)
en.description: Finds all 100% IV (perfect) Pokémon in your storage.

en.title: High Potential (High CP & IV)
en.description: Finds 3-4 star Pokémon with 2500+ CP, ready for high-level raids or Master League.

en.title: Investment Projects
en.description: Finds high IV (3-4 star) but low CP Pokémon that are worth powering up.

en.title: Ideal PvP IVs (Great/Ultra)
en.description: Finds low attack/high defense stats optimized for CP-capped leagues.

en.title: Purify for Hundo
en.description: Finds Shadow Pokémon that will become 100% IV specimens when purified.

en.title: Inventory Clean-up (Trash)
en.description: Finds safe-to-transfer Pokémon (non-shiny, non-perfect, non-legendary, etc.).

en.title: Caught Recently (3 Days)
en.description: Filters Pokémon caught in the last 3 days.

en.title: XP Grinding (Evolve)
en.description: Pokémon ready to evolve that do not require special items.

en.title: Trade Evolutions
en.description: Pokémon that cost 0 candy to evolve after being traded.

en.title: Distance Trades (100km+)
en.description: Filters Pokémon for bonus Candy and XL Candy when traded.

en.title: 1km Buddy Search
en.description: Finds Pokémon with the shortest buddy walking distance (1km).

en.title: XL Evolution Ready
en.description: Finds Pokémon you have enough XL candy to fully power up/evolve.

en.title: The Anti-Fighting Sandwich
en.description: Top tier defenders that counter common Fighting-type gym attackers.

en.title: The Golden Razz Wall
en.description: The best 'walls' to use when actively defending with Golden Razz Berries.

en.title: Quick Find All Top Tier
en.description: Quickly locates your strongest gym defenders with 2000+ CP.

en.title: Mega Evolve Ready
en.description: Filters Pokémon that currently have enough Mega Energy to evolve.
